name: testCheckTheHidingOfParameters
description: Check the hiding of parameters by pressing the chevron in Card details section
descriptionHtml: Check the hiding of parameters by pressing the chevron in Card details section

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as '0714.111029.25.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: Check the hiding of parameters by pressing the chevron in Card details section

steps.name: Click on 'Transactions' menu in Header
Select 'CompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' company using filter
Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click on the first transaction from the table
Click on chevron in Card details section
Verify: Parameter 'Payment method' is hidden after click on chevron in Card details field
Verify: Parameter 'Card holder' is hidden after click on chevron in Card details field
Verify: Parameter 'Card number' is hidden after click on chevron in Card details field
Verify: Parameter 'Expiry date' is hidden after click on chevron in Card details field
Click on chevron in Card details section
Verify: Parameter 'Name' is hidden after click on chevron in Customer details field
Verify: Parameter 'Date of birth' is hidden after click on chevron in Customer details field
Verify: Parameter 'E-Mail' is hidden after click on chevron in Customer details field
Verify: Parameter 'Phone' is hidden after click on chevron in Customer details field
Verify: Parameter 'Country' is hidden after click on chevron in Customer details field
Verify: Parameter 'State' is hidden after click on chevron in Customer details field
Verify: Parameter 'City' is hidden after click on chevron in Customer details field
Verify: Parameter 'ZIP' is hidden after click on chevron in Customer details field
Verify: Parameter 'Address' is hidden after click on chevron in Customer details field
